steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The word "placed" appears in: "a safe guess would have placed him somewhere in the debatable ground between forty and fifty." The subject is a guess and the action is about judging where someone falls on an age range. We need a word meaning to form a judgment or estimate about someone's age.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Changed: a guess doesn't change someone's age — wrong action entirely. ✗
  • Choice B — Arranged: to arrange implies physically ordering things, not judging an age. ✗
  • Choice C — Enlisted: means to enroll or recruit — no connection to guessing age. ✗
  • Choice D — Estimated: a guess would have estimated him between forty and fifty — captures the sense of forming a reasoned judgment about where he falls on the age scale. ✓
That is the correct answer.
